title: How far can you borrow? Divergence limits of cross-species Gene Ontology enrichment in non-model organisms — code and processed data

creators.name: Lee, Sung-Gwon
creators.affiliation: Biomedical Research Institute, Chonnam National University Hospital, Gwangju, Republic of Korea

creators.name: Park, Chungoo
creators.affiliation: School of Biological Sciences and Technology, Chonnam National University, Gwangju, Republic of Korea

description: Pipeline code and processed result tables for the cross-species GO-transfer divergence-tolerance benchmark across six focal species spanning three eukaryotic kingdoms. Raw inputs derive from public resources (UniProt, the GO Annotation database, Bgee, the EBI Expression Atlas, TimeTree); see DATA_SOURCES.md. Reproduce with the scripts in code/.
